name: Savory Hamburger Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart casserole, cook the sliced carrot and chopped onion with 1 tablespoon water on high for 2 minutes, covered.
2. Stir in the ground beef and continue cooking, uncovered, on high for 3 minutes, stirring once to break up the meat.
3. Drain off any excess fat.
4. Add the tomato sauce, remaining 1/2 cup water, dry red wine, sugar, salt, garlic powder, and pepper.
5. Cook, uncovered, on high for an additional 4 to 5 minutes, or until the mixture is heated through and vegetables are tender.
6. Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese and serve.
